defaultSafePolicy.alias: resolve alias target while preserving alias mode notes
defaultSafePolicy.future_effective: select by effective dates, never by array order
defaultSafePolicy.null_price: do not calculate; show unavailable/review message
defaultSafePolicy.redirect_billing: show original slug as retired/redirected and calculate against billingModelInternalId only with explicit label
defaultSafePolicy.review_required: display only with warning; no default or recommendation placement
defaultSafePolicy.unsafe: exclude from default calculations and show warning only where explicitly allowed

generatedAtPolicy: deterministic static timestamp for reviewable repo-local artifacts

routingDetails.semantics: Retired slug is retained for history and redirects to Grok 4.3 for current billing.
